## Privacy Check

- [ ] I have not included tax file numbers, identity documents, bank details, myGov credentials, employer identifiers, or exact sensitive tax records.
- [ ] Any numbers included below are rounded, anonymized, or safe to use for reproduction.

## Feedback Type

- [ ] Calculation concern
- [ ] App crash or error
- [ ] Form/input issue
- [ ] Save/export issue
- [ ] Accessibility issue
- [ ] Store/readiness issue
- [ ] Other
